rationale: User report: no timeout event on replicaset shutdown; behavior/event API question, no specific spec rule violated.
Non-ASCII collection name returns empty array; encoding bug in driver internals, no spec requirement cited.
Options not applied via MongoClient.connect(); implementation bug in options parsing, no specific spec rule contradicted.
findOne doesn't return cursor per docs; documentation/API contract issue, not a cross-language spec conformance issue.
Kerberos binding.gyp missing Linux target; build/packaging issue, no spec behavior involved.
Db not prototype-based; internal JS API/architecture issue, no spec conformance involved.
Documentation errors and copy-paste mistakes in API docs; doc typo, no spec behavior.
Intermittent 'no valid seed servers' on Ubuntu; platform-specific connectivity bug, not a spec deviation.
Typo 'returnl' in db.js open(); trivial code typo causing syntax error, not a spec issue.
Bulk insert WriteError not instanceof Error; Node.js API ergonomics issue, no spec rule about JS error types.
Long.toString() precision loss due to JS float precision limits; floating-point limitation, not a BSON spec violation.
Index creation with dotted key fails; server-side validation error surfacing, no spec rule contradicted.
Propose setImmediate over process.nextTick; internal Node.js event loop performance, no spec behavior.
Multiple require() calls conflict; module singleton/state bug in Node.js driver, no spec involvement.
Collection with dot in name fails in strict mode; internal collection name parsing bug, no spec rule cited.
promiseLibrary not propagated from Db to Collection in createCollection(); internal options-passing bug, no spec rule.
Build failure on OS X with Perl 5.8.8; compile error due to C++ type issues, no spec behavior.
Documentation for query/update method signatures is outdated; doc bug, no spec conformance issue.
Missing sort support in query; early feature gap, no spec document existed at this time for this behavior.
#define VERSION collision with mongo SDK stdafx.h; build/compilation conflict, no spec behavior.
Inserting float 0.123 gives 'type unhandled'; very early driver missing double support, pre-spec era.
Null/undefined values not supported in serialization; early missing feature, patch provided, pre-spec era.
Add stringification to OID; API ergonomic improvement with no description, not a spec conformance issue.
Build system improvement: check standard include paths for mongo libs; packaging/build, no spec behavior.
Allow separate include/lib path specification; build system improvement, no spec behavior.
No error reported on duplicate key insert; early driver missing error propagation, no spec rule cited.
Add fallback=>1 to overload in OID.pm; Perl language ergonomics fix, no spec conformance issue.
Test suite catastrophically fails on Debian; CI/test environment issue, no spec behavior.
No GridFS implementation; early missing feature request, not a spec nonconformance (feature not yet implemented).
Fix POD documentation; documentation update only, no spec behavior.
Uninitialized array values cause crash; Perl XS implementation bug in serialization, no spec rule cited.
PVNV scalar type unhandled in BSON serialization; Perl-specific type handling bug, no published BSON spec rule violated.
'multiple' option bug in collection.t; test suite failure, early driver bug with no spec rule cited.
Module::Build inc/ dir missing from CPAN tarball; packaging/distribution bug, no spec behavior.
Update count to accept size/limit fields; early feature addition, brief description, no spec rule cited.
Tests should drop databases after themselves; test hygiene improvement, no spec behavior.
Create Manual POD with tutorial and datatypes sections; documentation task, no spec conformance.
Newx() API not available in Perl 5.8.7; build compatibility issue for older Perl, no spec behavior.
Fix AnnoCPAN suggestions; documentation/annotation fix, no spec conformance.
Expose BSON serializer or create separate BSON module; API design/packaging feature request, not a spec nonconformance.
Add customized $ symbol option; trivial API feature with no description, not spec-related.
OID not stringified on insert; early Perl OID type coercion bug, no spec rule on return type from insert.
Inserting files over 4MB fails with 'chunks out of order'; GridFS implementation bug in chunk ordering, no spec rule cited.
Strawberry Perl lacks int64_t causing build failure on Windows; build/platform compatibility, no spec behavior.
Modification of non-creatable hash value when undef in result; Perl XS internal issue with undef handling, no spec rule.
Use developer version strings like 0.27_01 for pre-release; CPAN packaging convention, no spec behavior.
Serializing tie() causes segfault; Perl XS crash with tied hashes, no spec rule violated.
GridFS insert fails with non-file filehandle (in-memory scalar ref); GridFS implementation limitation, no spec rule cited.
Build fails on Windows XP with ActiveState and VC6; platform/compiler compatibility issue, no spec behavior.
fix_one documentation missing fields param; documentation fix, no spec conformance issue.
